source: CodeChef curated practice paths and roadmaps

visible_paths.name: 500 difficulty rating
visible_paths.title: 500 difficulty rating
visible_paths.description: Practice the most basic problems available on CodeChef. The problems are in the difficulty range of 0 - 500.

visible_paths.name: 500 to 1000 difficulty rating
visible_paths.title: 500 to 1000 difficulty problems
visible_paths.description: Practice the easy logical problems available on CodeChef. The problems are in the difficulty range of 500 to 1000.

visible_paths.name: 1000 to 1400 difficulty problems
visible_paths.title: 1000 to 1400 difficulty problems
visible_paths.description: Practice the problems which can help you become 1 star on CodeChef.

visible_paths.name: 1400 to 1600 difficulty problems
visible_paths.title: 1400 to 1600 difficulty problems
visible_paths.description: Practice problems which can help you become 2 star on CodeChef.

visible_paths.name: 1600 to 1800 difficulty problems
visible_paths.title: 1600 to 1800 difficulty problems
visible_paths.description: Practice problems which can help you become 3 star on CodeChef.

visible_paths.name: 1800 to 2000 difficulty problems
visible_paths.title: 1800 to 2000 difficulty problems
visible_paths.description: Practice problems which can help you become 4 star on CodeChef.

visible_paths.name: 2000 to 2500 difficulty problems
visible_paths.title: 2000 to 2500 difficulty problems
visible_paths.description: Practice problems which can help you reach 5 star and higher on CodeChef.

visible_paths.name: 500 to 1000 difficulty rating
visible_paths.title: 500 to 1000 difficulty rating
visible_paths.description: Practice the easy logical problems available on CodeChef. The problems are in the difficulty range of 500 to 1000.

visible_paths.name: Level up from 1* to 2*
visible_paths.title: Level up from 1* to 2*
visible_paths.description: Practice these problems curated to help you level up from a 1* on CodeChef to 2*

visible_paths.name: 1400 to 1600 difficulty problems
visible_paths.title: 1400 to 1600 difficulty problems
visible_paths.description: Practice problems which can help you become 2 star on CodeChef.

visible_paths.name: Jump from 2* to 3*
visible_paths.title: Jump from 2* to 3*
visible_paths.description: Practice these problems curated to help you jump up from a 2* on CodeChef to 3*

visible_paths.name: 1600 to 1800 difficulty problems
visible_paths.title: 1600 to 1800 difficulty problems
visible_paths.description: Practice problems which can help you become 3 star on CodeChef.

visible_paths.name: Rise from 3* to 4*
visible_paths.title: Rise from 3* to 4*
visible_paths.description: Practice these problems curated to help you rise from a 3* on CodeChef to 4*

visible_paths.name: Practice Arrays
visible_paths.title: Practice Arrays
visible_paths.description: Solve Arrays coding problems to start learning data structures and algorithms. This curated set of 23 standard Arrays questions will give you the confidence to solve interview questions.

visible_paths.name: Practice Strings
visible_paths.title: Practice Strings
visible_paths.description: Practice String problems in C, C++, Python, Java and 10+ other languages. Solve these questions on Strings and prepare yourself for handling text based data.

visible_paths.name: Linked Lists
visible_paths.title: Linked Lists
visible_paths.description: Learn about different types of linked lists like Singly Linked Lists, Circular Linked list and Doubly Linked lists. We will also learn how you can use them to solve problems.

visible_paths.name: Stacks and Queues
visible_paths.title: Stacks and Queues
visible_paths.description: Master Stack and Queue data structures by solving practice problems and answering questions. Learn LIFO and FIFO principles, implement efficient operations, and solve coding challenges. Perfect for beginners and experienced programmers alike.

visible_paths.name: Time complexity
visible_paths.title: Time complexity
visible_paths.description: Learn all about time complexity in our beginner course and apply this knowledge to build efficient algorithms. Solve these 30 plus practice questions on time complexity and prepare for interviews.

visible_paths.name: Searching and Sorting Algorithms
visible_paths.title: Searching and Sorting Algorithms
visible_paths.description: Master the fundamentals of searching and sorting algorithms with our beginner-friendly course! Perfect for students and early professionals, learn how to efficiently manipulate arrays and strings.

visible_paths.name: Practice Sorting
visible_paths.title: Practice Sorting
visible_paths.description: Practice problems which require you to use sorting algorithms to solve the task at hand. These questions help you understand the different patters of sorting problems and how to identify them.

visible_paths.name: Greedy Algorithms
visible_paths.title: Greedy Algorithms
visible_paths.description: Learn the concept of greedy algorithms and practice what you learnt in the different types of greedy problems

visible_paths.name: Two Pointers and Sliding Window Technique
visible_paths.title: Two Pointers and Sliding Window Technique
visible_paths.description: The two pointer and sliding window techniques are widely used algorithmic approach in computer science and programming. It is used to solve problems that can be efficiently solved by maintaining two positions or indices in a sequence or array.

visible_paths.name: Prefix Sum Problems
visible_paths.title: Prefix Sum Problems
visible_paths.description: Practice these 14 problems on Prefix and Suffix sum. Learn about how to create prefix arrays, suffix arrays and use them to efficiently solve a variety of programming problems.

visible_paths.name: Binary Search
visible_paths.title: Binary Search
visible_paths.description: Learn about Binary search, an efficient search algorithm for sorted data. Binary search algorithm dramatically reduces the time complexity of search to logarithmic, making it incredibly fast for large scale data.

visible_paths.name: Recursion
visible_paths.title: Recursion
visible_paths.description: Learn how to write recursive code and apply recursion to easily solve problems.

visible_paths.name: 2D Array / Matrices
visible_paths.title: 2D Array / Matrices
visible_paths.description: Practice problems on 2D Arrays or Matrices with our careful chosen set of 23 problems. Matrix is 2 dimensional data structures which can be used to represent grids, paths etc. Questions on 2D Arrays are generally asked in interviews to check your implementation skills.

visible_paths.name: Trees and Binary trees
visible_paths.title: Trees and Binary trees
visible_paths.description: Learn Trees by solving all the standard problems on Trees, Binary Trees and Binary Search Trees

visible_paths.name: Graphs
visible_paths.title: Graphs
visible_paths.description: Graph is a fundamental data structure used to model relations and networks. Learn all about how to represent Graphs, and apply different algorithms like DFS, BFS etc

visible_paths.name: Heaps
visible_paths.title: Heaps
visible_paths.description: Learn about how Heaps are implement and solve coding problems related to heaps. This course covers Heap from a practical perspective giving you the ability to solve any Heap related questions in future.

visible_paths.name: Bit Manipulation
visible_paths.title: Bit Manipulation
visible_paths.description: Bit manipulation is a fundamental programming technique that involves operating on individual bits within data. This course covers basic bitwise operators (AND, OR, XOR, NOT), shift operations, and their properties. It then progresses to practical applications, including array operations, problem-solving using XOR properties, and advanced bit manipulation techniques for algorithmic efficiency.

visible_paths.name: Dynamic programming
visible_paths.title: Dynamic programming
visible_paths.description: Learn how to apply Dynamic Programming algorithm to solve optimization problems. This course will equip you with the fundamentals required to identify and solve a Dynamic Programming problem.

visible_paths.name: Number theory
visible_paths.title: Number theory
visible_paths.description: Learn basic number theory concepts and their implementation in our Number Theory course. Understand and solve concepts such as prime numbers, divisibility, modular arithmetic, sieve of eratosthenes, and Fermat Little Theorem.

visible_paths.name: Combinatorics
visible_paths.title: Combinatorics
visible_paths.description: This course teaches the basics of Combinatorics necessary for solving coding problems. It covers fundamental concepts and their applications in problem-solving, suitable for intermediate-level learners.

visible_paths.name: Hashing
visible_paths.title: Hashing
visible_paths.description: Hashing is the process of converting input data of any size into a fixed-size string of characters, typically a sequence of numbers and letters. Learn all about how to create hash values and use them to solve problems.

visible_paths.name: Disjoint Set Union
visible_paths.title: Disjoint Set Union
visible_paths.description: Learn all the Disjoint set union, a very simple data structure which can be used to solve problems like finding connected components.

visible_paths.name: Tries
visible_paths.title: Tries
visible_paths.description: Learn all about Trie data structure and it's application in this short course. You will be able to implement a Trie by yourself by the end of this course.

visible_paths.name: Data Structures Interview Questions
visible_paths.title: Data Structures Interview Questions
visible_paths.description: Prepare yourselves for technical interview with a carefully curated set of problems that appeared in companies like Google, Facebook, Amazon, Microsoft, Adobe, Flipkart, OLX Group, Walmart Labs, eBay, Ola, LinkedIn & more
